Feel free to fork this project and add your own Anime characters! To add a new character, simply add their drawing logic and combat cooldowns inside js/units.js.# And if you can't code then just don't use AI it disrespects the work. You can ask someone to code for you not AI

**FOR ANY HATERS THIS IS NOT GENERATED BY AI**
# ⚔️ Voxel Havoc: Anime Auto-Battler
![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-23.0-blue)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green)

Voxel Havoc is a chaotic, high-performance 2D auto-battler and god-simulator. Spawn armies, build civilizations, grant elemental powers, and drop legendary anime characters into the battlefield to watch the chaos unfold.

### 👑 Developed by: Scourge/SFH/Falah
**Date:** May 2026

---

## 🚀 Features

* **Coastal Warfare Map:** Dynamic biome rendering featuring deep ocean, sandy beaches, and grassy plains. Units that survive in the water learn to swim, gaining massive 4x speed boosts!
* **Massive 2D Battles:** Render hundreds of individual units clashing at 60 FPS with screen shake, damage text, and neon VFX.
* **Civilization System:** If left in peace (Wall Closed), units will automatically build houses to multiply, stone armories to craft weapons, and shrines to unlock magic.
* **Deep Class Mechanics:** 
    * *Swappers:* Instant teleportation and hit combos.
    * *Shifters:* Instantly steal enemies' abilities and weapons.
    * *War Elephants:* Massive siege beasts that can be equipped with Cannons.
* **Legendary Anime Gods:** Drop Goku, Luffy, Gojo, or Naruto into the map. They fight as solo teams with screen-wiping ultimate abilities (Kamehameha, Hollow Purple, Kurama Summons).

---

## 🎮 How to Play

1.  **Clone or Download** this repository.
2.  Open `index.html` in any modern web browser. No installation or server required!
3.  Select your **Team Color** from the sidebar.
4.  Click the canvas to **Spawn Units**.
5.  Toggle the **Wall** to OPEN to let the teams fight!

---

## 📁 File Structure

The project is fully modularized for clean development and easy feature expansion:
```text
/VoxelHavoc
│── index.html           # Main UI, Canvas, and Start Menu
│── style.css            # Styling for the sidebar and modals
│── README.md            # Project documentation
└── /js
    │── globals.js       # Core shared variables, canvas setup, and state
    │── engine.js        # Core animation loop, map rendering, and input handling
    │── units.js         # Logic & rendering for basic classes and Anime Gods
    │── civilization.js  # Logic for buildings (Houses, Shrines, Armories)
    └── others.js        # Projectile physics, damage text, and visual effects
